nasb.text: To the east he settled as far as the entrance of the wilderness from the river Euphrates, because their cattle had increased in the land of Gilead.

esv.text: He also lived to the east as far as the entrance of the desert this side of the Euphrates, because their livestock had multiplied in the land of Gilead.

cnv.text: 他也向東面遷居，直到幼發拉底河這邊曠野的邊緣，因為他們在基列地的牲畜增多起來。

ccb.text: 他们的牲畜在基列繁殖众多，便又向东迁移到幼发拉底河西边的旷野。
